data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Streamlining decision-making processes by reducing the number of choices displayed at once.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Design is optimized for easier accessibility of interactive elements for improved user efficiency.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Application of Gestalt principles to improve user perception and organization of content.

data.title: Aesthetic–Usability Effect
data.description: Enhances user satisfaction and perceived usability through aesthetically pleasing design.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Utilizes existing conventions to create familiar user experiences across different devices.
